description: Investigate a student's activity claims by logging in as admin (username: admin, password: Admin1234!). Generate an activity log report for student 'Jane Smith' in the course 'Introduction to Biology' (BIO101) filtered for the current date. Export the filtered logs to an Excel spreadsheet at /home/ga/Documents/audit_evidence.xlsx. If the logs show the student viewed the course today, create a text file at /home/ga/Documents/verdict.txt containing 'CONFIRMED'; otherwise, write 'DENIED'.
